The ones that did offer quotes (Top Line) offered very high prices with no guarantee on the price or when they might get to it.  Aerial offered a fair price, which did not change, and they provided a set time period to complete the work, which they followed through on.  Their employee J.D. and all other staff were competent, hard working, honest, and considerate of the homeowner's needs.  I would definitely use Aerial Roofing again and recommend everyone needing roofing to talk to Aerial.  They do not take your business for granted and unlike other contractors working in the current building boom, they don't hire just anyone who can swing a hammer and call them a carpenter. title: Aerial Roofing Ltd.
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Jim Tomash","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK453b3XNGeyuMW5nBwJ9ZbrL61JGZXA5gOK3Z4M3BRUfrZJw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Aerial was out to replace my roof in December right before the great snowstorm of 2022.

The crew (Sergio) did a great job, were respectful, pleasant, and extremely hard workers.   They also took into account the weather and worked quickly to ensure there would be no issues with the coming rain/snow.

Aerial provided me with one of the most competitive quotes of the 6 other roofing companies that I had come out, and were quick to respond to any questions I had throughout the process.  Tom the owner & Kyron were really helpful when it came to choosing the right shingle & color.

Unfortunately due to backlogs, it did take 6+ months for my roof to be replaced from when I had the estimate done, but I was aware it could take that long.

I opted for the high profile capping which was quite reasonably priced and really adds a nice look to the roof.

Overall I cannot recommend Aerial and Sergio & his crew enough.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICBs-LruAE&fid=0x0:0x82d27a7f58b05366"],"When":"2023-1-3"},{"Name":"Wil van der Pijl","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ9ezKpO8qegCajqm-vVHuzWIH875UFJdUc0sEh01L2E6SvmQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"There is only one term to describe the quality of this business, " Master class craftsmanship" from quote to finish complete professionalism!!! Alonso and his crew were very courteous, kind and considerate. We could not have wished for better. Master class Craftsmanship, thank you so very much!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDpvp3reQ&fid=0x0:0x82d27a7f58b05366"],"When":"2023-8-22"},{"Name":"Emma Puddy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIFSk04R5yW7uIlEROCHD_nV6zwBV7TM3ge9SY76EDpOllWkQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our car battery died while getting groceries and you were happy to give us a boost. Tom and Kyron in the office (quotations, scheduling, invoicing) are knowledgeable and communicated well. They do give you a call back, unlike some of the other roofers we contacted and never heard back.

From  the initial contact to the completion of the job these people were friendly, responsive and highly professional. The repair was extremely well done. I wasn't expecting that the entire cost would be borne by Victoria Roofing but I received no invoice. This is a company that does business the way it was once done. We are lucky to have businesses like this one.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"D H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKCi1ZVVvEFzFWAUuztNQpYUv2ALNmxNysAgAPJiLti_NrVBQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Re-did our roof in 2020. Missed posting a review then so doing one now. The employees made sure that we had the best instalation possible. The employees had an amazing work ethic. They left our yard and the neighbouring property clear of debris and nails. They not only cared about our property but others too. Recommended to neighbours. Highly recommend to anyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"McQuay Family","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX-eI41pZtZVjWS_G9nmJSFalMYK8Pee9Clsr7rre31qR2D8ZBQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Victoria Roofing was excellent.  Rob swung by and did an assessment, gave us quotes with various options, sent us addresses of houses that he had done with the colours we were interested in.  Communications were always prompt and professional.  I was a bit taken aback when there was only one guy on the crew to do our house, but he was awesome and did a terrific job.  I work from home and checked in with him each day, he kept me apprised with anything that he found that he thought would be of interest.  The job site was cleaned up at the end of each day and they even accommodated our small child's nap with the order in which they tackled our roof.  Our roof looks amazing and I'm extremely happy with the service that we received.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michelle Tan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLTMOk-SxBy4-Bpnlt5609VKQr22YrdVnz4i1c8INPS-nedMg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Recently had the roof replaced on our home and we could not be more pleased. Rob, Brendan and all of the other staff were attentive, responsive to our needs, and always available to ensure we were completely satisfied. The work done looks fantastic and of very high quality. Would 100% recommend this company without hesitation. I thank Victoria Roofing very much.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXwmRhbBgi63MVBX671RShk-QIJi31SDvN9mGEhoI6oicu5QWSw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"For great work and for people that are kind and comfortable to deal with, I totally recommend Victoria Roofing. From the very start, Rob was very friendly and informative and also very thorough and patient with all my questions on several phone calls, back and forth over quite a period of time before they actually began work on our house. Rob has a great attitude and is easy going, as is Brennan, who came out to do the estimate. Brennan was professional and very nice, which stood out among the other individuals I had to deal with from other companies during the initial selection process. And Randy and Alex who did the actual work on our roof, did a great job...they were fast and efficient, know their stuff, have attention to detail and care for their work, very down to earth and just good guys.
And Sandra has such a pleasant attitude when helping and dealing on the phone with any questions or concerns. She has the kind of customer service that one would expect from the good old days that isn't easily found much anymore.
Good people all around. They care. They do great work. And very reasonably priced for sure.
You won't go wrong with hiring Victoria Roofing.
Just a very good experience.
Thank you guys!
Tara","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Randy Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKVGf-Mcccpww7fKaKYzuJZLX33fYnzkK2qMr6WyVxcK18h6w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Completely lived up to their reputation for quality service over four generations.  The crew was friendly and professional in every respect and our home was left absolutely spotless at the end of each working day.  Rob and Sandra were most helpful in arranging for the job to be scheduled and completed.  A perfectly executed project from start to finish.  Highly recommended.  Our sincere thanks to all!

cheers......RL","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Linda Romeril","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJGbkCnum8VmGUsGj6KaR-_4o19RP--NZpFuvXpfpcv-WuQ9Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This family owned and operated business (4 generations, now) has been doing amazing work for my family for almost 60 years. They show up when they say they will, do all of what they promise (and then some), and do a thorough clean up when they're finished the job. The most recent installation was completed a day ahead of schedule , and I absolutely love my new roof!  Victoria Roofing, offers friendly, professional service and quality work you can count on. I highly recommend this company for all your roofing needs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lisa Wren","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUfYE_muy1XOEytj969QQ_LcFAxq8i4470bTFU_kYCigdGl8PrC=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Recently realized our roof was needing some help.  Called Victoria Roofing, had the estimate within 24 hours of our call and the roof replacement booked in two days.    In less than a week, we went from being concerned about a roof leak to a brand new, beautifully installed roof.   The yard was cleaned up so quickly and efficiently that you never would have known a roofing crew had been there just hours before.
Incidentally, we had called another company same day and didn't even hear back from them with an offer for site visit for over a week.
Highly recommend Victoria Roofing!!    We have already told a number of our friends and neighbors how happy we are.","Images":null,"When":""}]

open_hours: {"Friday":["Closed"],"Monday":["8:30 a.m.–4 p.m."],"Saturday":["Closed"],"Sunday":["Closed"],"Thursday":["8:30 a.m.–4 p.m."],"Tuesday":["8:30 a.m.–4 p.m."],"Wednesday":["8:30 a.m.–4 p.m."]}
user_reviews: [{"Name":"SandyL","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVyukJNm-G6Y0UICXSFnWVhOy9PENXe5b7joJobtvTm7INHnsGT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I highly recommend RR Roofer Rider. I received four different quotes for replacing a 35 year old roof and decided to go with them after Vincent (the owner) came by personally, to give me a quote. He went onto the roof to inspect it and came inside the house to view the attic and answer all my questions. I found Vincent very personable, knowledgeable and honest, he put me at ease right away. I received the quote the same day. I was very pleased that his crew were able to start the new roof in the cold month of January and complete it in a reasonable amount of time which was a lot of work since the old metal roof had been placed on top of the much older asphalt roof.  The foreman suggested installing a skylight for the bathroom to bring in more light and make use of a large ceiling opening that had housed old lighting. While they were replacing the roof was the perfect time to install the skylight. The crew were friendly and polite whenever I spoke to them and did a great cleanup job when the work was complete. They also took photos of the new roof for me which I appreciated.  Vincent also came by after completion to inspect the work that was done. Deciding to spend money on a new roof isn't easy but I really felt comfortable in my decision to go with RR Roof Rider.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCA9O-ZbA\u0026fid=0x0:0x2d7bf3266dcbe5d6"],"When":"2025-1-29"},{"Name":"Michael Barker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL1fVG5iXjBdlIN4WiOo0lip_wzSIBXc_-7lDrdVzL885Etgg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After researching several companies I decided to select Roofrider. Vincent was the only person to look in my attic and give an honest assessment.  He promptly provided a detailed quote with all of the information on the products used. Once Vincent's professional team arrived they installed the roof in a very professional way and took pride in my yard and respected my neighbors. The team ensured that only the best products were used. The team took the time to make sure the yard was clean after everyday. I would recommend this company who wants a professionally installed roof that you can be proud of.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Darrell Greenwood","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXECZcMWrVZvWF1jhE2KT04FIoLSU6W2WbUTYFfCvyNe4EBwM0Y=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a very stressful situation when our roof started leaking, and we needed help fast. We reached out to Vincent at Roof Riders who understood the urgency of our problem and went above and beyond to fit us into their schedule.\nNeil from Roof Riders came out the same day and promptly resolved our leaking roof issue.\nIf you are looking for a roofing company that is reliable, professional, and provides incredibly prompt service, look no further than Roof Riders. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rob Robson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI43820hwGjA4wGpMwVtUD7fqlr-fv9or3zke1xXkfaTvFRmQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Right from the start Vincent and his Roof Rider team surpassed my expectations. First off, the communication was excellent. The foreman, Kevin kept me informed when they would arrive and start working and also let me know during the day when they would leave each day. They kept my driveway tidy and clean as there was a lot of equipment, supplies to be used. When they were finished, they took me on a walk around to ensure I was satisfied with their work and the cleanup. I really appreciated Vincent’s visit to ensure I was happy with the work and if I had any questions or comments. Really amazing Customer Service!! I will definitely suggest using them to anyone that I know. Thanks!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID9rayxGg\u0026fid=0x0:0x2d7bf3266dcbe5d6"],"When":"2024-3-19"},{"Name":"Peter Wan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL-V-TiKU2JKwD8xARkwpRaxEU_STSkgtjzcd3JA0y1mTN4eg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I highly recommend Roof Rider.  Vincent (the owner) will give you a quote that uses only high quality materials and makes sure all aspects meet or are beyond industry standards.  The new vents and new flashings look much better than the previous generation that was on there before.  In fact, the new roof looks so much better than what it replaced.  We had two new 4’x4’ skylights installed at the same time and Roof Rider gave me quotes for them that were very competitive.  I thought they were a great deal!  Now the house looks very much brighter with natural light coming into the house as never before.  Once the team arrives at your home, they work fast and typically can finish off your roof in a few days.  Vincent is personable, honest and reliable and knows just about everything in the roofing business.  Highly recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICalufnXQ\u0026fid=0x0:0x2d7bf3266dcbe5d6"],"When":"2021-7-30"},{"Name":"Anna Heckmann","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLE4qxjYgaRh2tlcUsNz4ErZKdQUzSgLXrE4BFiexqKyGcdBQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After purchasing a new home I had roof rider come give me a roof replacement quote on a 23 year old roof. The home inspector had said that it likely had 5 more years left as it was in good condition. I wanted to see if a roofing company would agree or provide me with different information. Vincent looked at my roof and said exactly the same thing and pointed out some things to be aware of such as don’t remove the moss at this point, careful of your skylight and don’t fix siding until you do the roof. I truly valued all of this information as it was in our best interest and not a business trying to sell me something we didn’t need yet. I will definitely come back to roof rider when we need them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Maria Hendrikx","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-eKDiZ93tQfo63ei-tfkWNOCu7ZRygY5yD9Fazb_DfAk6E2gp=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Staff at Roof Rider are always courteous and efficient. Vincent is thorough and objective in telling us how a project will go and we will be using their company yet again to tend to replacing our house roof.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDq1PynwgE\u0026fid=0x0:0x2d7bf3266dcbe5d6"],"When":"2021-6-29"},{"Name":"Sherry\u0026Fred Thorsteinson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUslr6o-PGQXAy1M7lezf1Wq-4GH6lQpG7hSVGw0IHsWFq_nPfPZw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We've just had our roof re-shingled by R R Roof Riders. The staff from Proline were a pleasure to work with at all stages of the project, right from the first contact with their Admin staff,  the person that provided the quote, the roofers, the supervisor, the gutter installer, etc... I received the quote in October 2022.  They were upfront with the amount of work they had and said it would be roughly 4-5 months before they would get to ours.  They showed up just over 4 months after the quote was provided. The cost was exactly what they quoted me.  There was an additional cost to replace rotten boards but they made me aware of that potential when they provided the quote. The cost to replace the rotten boards was reasonable and they provided me with photos of the areas and the supervisor followed up to answer any questions.  They were very accommodating when I asked that they permanently install two safety hooks for cleaning the gutters.  The quality of the work was excellent as was the cleanup (end of every day) and disposal of the old shingles.  They completed the work in the time they estimated for the roof and the gutters.  They kept us very well informed throughout the process.  Highly recommend this company.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICR95ipHw&fid=0x0:0x2441c67aa79718ab"],"When":"2023-4-13"},{"Name":"Mike H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVvZSvwGmOitFGSrBbYIYytmB82PfjNQymHfjNsW1xwO2gFgLzE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Outstanding service and work, highly recommended! Friendly, professional, flexible, and thorough are just some of the good qualities I would use to describe them. Workmanship is spot-on, the crews are great to work with, and our roof and gutters look awesome. They're diligent about cleaning up at the end of each day, and always keep you informed about their schedule. They were flexible and accommodating for scheduling, and we were quite happy to be fit in where the busy spring season could allow. If you're looking for a professional company to perform quality roof repair or replacement, do yourself a favor and call Proline - anyone I spoke to who worked with them had nothing but good things to say, and it's been a huge relief for us to have such an integral component of our house replaced correctly. Hopefully roof will not need warranty work as i can't imagine it will be easy to deal with them. Biggest thing is that I don't know much about roofs and rely heavily on trusting the company I am working with and that is not there unfortunately.

UPDATE:  upon reading this review, the company reached out to me promptly and paid a visit. They come absolutely ripping down the highway racing towards Tsawwassen ferry terminal going god knows how many kilometers over the speed limit when you can barely see 20m ahead of you. A car in front of me signals and switches to the left lane ahead of the ascension truck, the acsencion truck almost instintually goes to swerve into the right lane to blaze by someone trying to just get home. He realizes I'm still in the right lane and does a bit of a swerve while slamming the brakes to not hit the guy in front. [{"Name":"Mike Spaz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLLkDpH9_ZrWRkv_LvxNuSzSPvpth1it0weGjRd5WTju_IPJA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jared is a pleasure to deal with.  He's professional, responsive, accommodating and prices his jobs fairly.  We had a leak, which we originally tried to repair; however, when it was determined we needed to replace the roof, Jared walked us through the process. He outlined the required work and broke down the quote in detail for us, then, was flexible and accommodating when scheduling the work. Jared and crew were professional and polite while on site, did high quality work (explaining things as they went), and left the side clean and safe each work day and upon completion of the job.  We highly recommend Brokop for your roofing needs.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAM2QHZOPZQ5r9n87dVCuRe&fid=0x0:0x87f969989ea93cd3"],"When":"2026-2-4"},{"Name":"Gloria Walker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVjF-usz_lSPhq9DqBpKxGASw0eo05aar8vPzeAHEr4IcPQ6kE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Firstly, I would like to point out that I own the front half of a front/back duplex, and the owners of the back half were not interested in having their half re-roofed.  This necessitated additional alternations to clearly define my one-half.

Jared Brokop, the owner/manager of Brokop Roofing, was an absolute pleasure to deal with and was very responsive throughout the job.  Initially he spent time up in my attic and noted a number of things that were not up to today's standards, including no plywood under the shingles, bathroom ventilation pipes that exited into the attic and poor ventilation generally.  All of the above were corrected and he installed an Omni Ridge ventilation system.

I noted that his team were like a FAMILY and worked like a well-oiled machine -- very professional, courteous, hard working and rendered a very high degree of workmanship.  They started promptly each day, and left the property in a tidy and safe condition.  It has been my observation that these qualities are a rarity in most trades, in today's world.  They brought in a large dumping container for the old shingles and laid down tarps on the ground to catch any falling debris, with special attention to my plants and shrubs below.  The grounds were kept clean and organized throughout the two day installation.  Once they were finished, they went over my entire driveway with a magnetic sweeper to catch any loose nails, so as to eliminate me experiencing a flat tire.

The shingles and labour warranty are fully transferable to any future buyer, which increases my house value.  I also noted that his company has an A+ Better Business Rating.

UNQUESTIONABLY, I would HIGHLY recommend Brokop Roofing to anyone that is looking for a superior roofing job.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shayla Baumeler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI-gkuZcWFjEN1aTRbRQWGI-725eKw12qkdkE95_f9OikSxHg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently purchased a home in Victoria and had some concerns with my roof. Jared was communicative, kind and quick to come assess the situation. His team then came to do a few repairs on my roof. Jared truly went above and beyond, and I would highly recommend Brokop Roofing!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anna Fisher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIjteToMEKsaAQo6qappHAnfLxTt4mnE8oanolUkSKpbP6SUw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jared and his guys did a fantastic job on my roof!! They were so efficient in getting it done in just a couple days for a very good price. The quality of their work is amazing!! Jared has been an absolute pleasure to deal with and very responsive throughout the job. I would definitely recommend them","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mark Appleton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKe1P2F0bTPUUfuKxMoTw6DZCAe4apEYVqBRrZFifWaIFF8Xc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We are in the process of completing the roofing of our small three unit townhouse strata located in the Rockland area of Victoria. As the attached photo confirms our was  a reasonably complex project, and one that was critical to maintaining the ambiance and charm of the property. Extreme care needed to be exercised in order to limit any disruption or damage to the established gardens while meeting timelines that aligned with other trades including painters, new gutters, siding etc.

The Strata looked at several companies and received a number of quotes before  unanimously agreeing to go with Jared Brokop of Brokop Roofing. Jared right from the start took an interest in the challenges of the project in the context of spending  time to do his due diligence understanding the concerns and needs of each owner. His pricing was competitive, while his knowledge behind recommending products suitable to meet and satisfy the diverse requirements of the owners was first class. The job is in the process of completing, and we are happy to report it has been done on time, within scope and on budget. He has arranged for other trades on our behalf and co-ordinated work on the site to ensure completion in an orderly manner. His success is because he runs one crew, treats them very well and is personally involved in the project. He is clearly liked and respected by his people all of whom are hard working, well mannered and courteous; something that in todays world seem missing especially in the roofing trade. After starting the project they never missed a day, started promptly and left the site each day in a tidy and safe condition.

Folks, if you are thinking of a new roof - call Jared you will not be disappointed. He and his crew are first class.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID4vZ7dkQE&fid=0x0:0x87f969989ea93cd3"],"When":"2019-5-31"},{"Name":"Brandon Munro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJoUKQ6sKog5LPCDXNwYnIm-CAPw5NC7Hhr7WK6rel4yRyv0w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jared and team did a terrific job replacing our roof this week, very professional and high quality workmanship and site cleanup. Would highly recommend using them in your next roofing job. Very knowledgeable and a great crew. Thanks again.   Sidney BC","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jim Knox","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXgimA70c8IyPzmH0kSCXyDTo21aRTdAHYNG6jRTOhfjwC7b6gV=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We have a very high, very steep roof and Brokop Roofing did an excellent job replacing it.  They completed the work exactly when they said they would, for the price they quoted, no surprises or delays.  The owner runs a great crew and is up on the roof himself everyday making sure things are done right.  Can't recommend this local company enough, really conscientious and respectful.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICc7-jctQE&fid=0x0:0x87f969989ea93cd3"],"When":"2020-5-3"},{"Name":"Norma Bogart","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK9ppA_64SkzNCnfEzpdPqCQUvf0Z9xBrq3nvnKJeaYInUySg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jared and team did a great job on our commercial roofing project. We would highly recommend as the roof was completed on time and on budget! As well, Jared was a pleasure to work with throughout the process!

Norma Bogart
Executive Assistant
Hartwig Industries
Victoria, BC","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Stephan Jacob","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX4BZ9oS_fDXW8AteWpuAAn7KtyaxXEZcgm-f4HJZHgRH_O1WNm=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Got a new roof just before x-mas. Excellent work / fast / clean. Craftsmanship seems to be flawless - I'm not a roofer - but everything got done, no more leaks, they removed an old chimney while they were up there and replaced a couple of dodgy plywood sections they found once they removed the old shingles. Every thing was done on time and on budget, including working late into the evening when we had a storm coming. Very tidy during install and after the work was completed. Friendly staff, good communication and very reasonably priced. The only thing is the paperwork could be improved upon (i.e. receipt for first instalment) ;) Five stars all around! Thank you.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCR62li2faWu2E0Amh-6AqT&fid=0x0:0x378dedb5c9ed7a76"],"When":"2026-1-23"},{"Name":"Graham Bennett","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIac7gWlMbwqik_01icqktJxSWSOmvJRK963ilKWZw5PHTTgg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Started So Well and Ended So Badly

I used Square Deal to install a new roof and new gutters on our detached garage. Their quote was competitive and we authorized them to proceed. After some delay they completed both jobs, with one exception. Due to the presence of a tree at one corner of the garage, they had to leave completion of the roofing and gutter until the tree was removed. We paid the entire invoice in good faith.

When we removed the tree, we requested that they come back and finish up. That was in November 2021. Despite following up with them several times (and being assured they would come and finish), they have never come back. When I contacted them again last week, they advised that I should 'deal with it in another way'.

I have attached a photo of what I guess Square Deal considers to be a complete job. There are lots of roofers in Victoria - I'd recommend you find one that will complete the job they were paid for and that seems to leave out Square Deal.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC27JO36wE&fid=0x0:0x378dedb5c9ed7a76"],"When":"2022-4-14"},{"Name":"Nic Stankov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLoaLLSj9k-WaYmGG68xQVrfi-kLBpcUfFjtsAKjPO9yrzwv4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We sprung a couple of leaks in our roof over a two month period. We spoke with several roofing contractors and decided to work with Square Deal Roofing. Jordan was very professional and thorough. He listened when I had questions and gave solid answers and advice. We decided to have our roof replaced and went with malarkey Vista 40 yr for tiles and had all the badger boards and fascia replaced along with our gutters. We even decided to have the fascia boards wrapped in black aluminum to preserve them. Jordan's team was very meticulous in their work, quick, clean, and kept the noise to a minimum. We would recommend Square Deal Roofing without hesitation. Oh and the price was very competitive as well.
Update - we just had ken in to replace most of the vents on our new 90's house  and repair a few downspouts - Ken is very quick to respond and did great work :) Thanks so much!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Peter Bourne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJmi249G3CyQ7keQiu8XlCKNUMF2MVkJUKlDUicL3d2sCRtdQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been dealing with Square Deal Roofing for many years, and it's always been a great experience! Ken and Jordan replaced the roof on my previous home about 9 years ago. After I moved, the cedar shingle roof on my new house looked pretty ragged, but Ken did an inspection and said I could get several more years out of it -- and I did. But the time was up, and I just had them replace a rental house roof, and my own house and garage roof in Oct/Nov 2019. I was diligent and got a few other quotes, but their quote was the best. And it was easy to hire them because I knew they would be fair and do a great job -- and they did! The whole team was fast and efficient. They made sure to protect my and my neighbour's property when they did the tear-off. The new roof looks great (and even impressed my developer-neighbour). The yard was left looking great both during and at the end of the job. Ken and Jordan are friendly and great to deal with. I've already passed their name on to two friends who need roofing services, and I would not hesitate to recommend them to anyone!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mary Davies","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUt8fVm-UWqQtIRwT_vTcooFLnJq1XBR5oRh2jwTD734FVVU3sq=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I highly recommend Square Deal Roofing! I was very pleased with the work that was done and the pricing was also competitive. Jordan and crew were prompt, tidy and hard working. I was very impressed with their daily cleanup routine leaving the space in great shape each day. Now that I have a lovely new roof I won't be needing a roofer myself anytime soon but if I were, I'd use Square Deal Roofing again in a heartbeat :)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Whitney Larzelere","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ-LHirR4O_h1mD0eYZ0N7Auqa2UAGMYQornHviD1txj2NlkA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a wonderful experience working with Square Deal roofing. I will definitely be recommending your team!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jan Wallace","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4y4mVubqBuoj0g-D1Bs3a1qGQpWHHcvQUu6IV1VQV4jx9100=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ken & Jordan are wonderful. [{"Name":"Tanis Nijjar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX-R_Npi7FlIOMhEeHKPks_vP097a5h0u0iNQTYiKgLQdp6lSwA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were really happy working with Vincent and his crew at Roof Rider. Due to a roof leak in the heavy spring rain I frantically called 20 roofing companies Roof Rider returned our inquiry and Vincent assessed the roof within a few days. Providing an extensive and inclusive quote/work order, that was very comprehensive. They offer GAF warranty on materials, and the longest number of years on labor that we compared with other companies. We experienced very respectful tradespeople and office staff. Answering all questions and following up with us, even when in the busy season.  The crew was thorough in the removal of the old roof, installation and cleaned up efficiently. We have no concerns or felt anything could have made our experience better.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Robert Oyler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWHepGfUpwpbHMq70N23bu0Yd2u9eHRUxVrGqhnzY62iYhfKu0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":""I recently had the pleasure of working with Roof Rider to update my roof, and I couldn't be more impressed with the entire experience. From start to finish, they demonstrated the utmost professionalism, making the entire process seamless and stress-free.

The team at Roof Rider provided a service that was not only top-notch but also reasonably priced. It's refreshing to find a company that values both quality and affordability. Their efficiency was remarkable, completing the project in a timely manner without compromising on the meticulous attention to detail that sets them apart.

What stood out the most, however, was the friendly and communicative nature of the entire staff. From the initial consultation to the final inspection, every member of the team was approachable and eager to address any questions or concerns I had. They kept me well-informed at every stage of the project, ensuring I felt confident and informed throughout.

The quality of their work speaks volumes about their dedication to excellence. The end result exceeded my expectations, and it's evident that Roof Rider takes pride in delivering nothing short of exceptional craftsmanship.

Overall, I highly recommend Roof Rider for anyone in need of roofing services. They've set a high standard for professionalism, affordability, efficiency, and friendliness. It's rare to find a company that excels in every aspect of their service, but Roof Rider has certainly achieved that and more. Thank you for a job well done!"","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bob Joseph","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKciTPN1lOY6vrD4QrRhApVHsmB5NhWlNjk5LFG4JMdgAR3rw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had Roof Rider do a combination membrane/metal roof with a lot of
replacement sheeting and all new facia boards. The job was a significant
amount of work and not inexpensive, but I am satisfied with the result. There is no doubt my house has risen in value due to the work, but more importantly it just looks great and the workmanship by installers Mark and Leslie is top shelf. Vincent from Roof Riders is a fair man who stands behind his work and product. He is also very accessible for a busy man, and will return your calls and answer any questions or concerns expeditiously with a pleasant and professional attitude. I have no problem recommending Roof Rider for all your roofing needs. Bob","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Deborah Dickie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLIkXx_ea5GN_36an4Ndbg5lmtnJTUnYdz3ILvuwL3Oy5wEPw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My home received some heat damage when a large hot fire happened directly from behind. Inspections were done, with repairs being necessary. Vincent Cummings was the one that inspected my roof. He was very thorough and provided an excellent report that included detailed information and photos of all areas of my roof. I followed up with a phone call for further explanation. He was patient and helpful answering all my questions. He was very professional yet friendly. Very easy to talk to. I believe my adjuster will now be proceeding with Vincent's recommended repair. Thank you very much for the great service","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Laura L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5O-jNwrEZsgKaE95G4ouqmtPi7GU5ZYl5gDy9jCRpZmWgtqo=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The initial examination was thorough and a venting problem in relation to two bathroom vents and the range hood vent in the attic was noted.  Some mold had formed on some of the OSB boards as a result of this improper venting.  Vincent's approach was to replace the affected wood, and reroute the vents from their exit points in my soffits to vents in the roof where they belong.  I felt Vincent looked well beyond the roof installation to ensure my house was in top shape and free of issues.  The roof installation went smoothly and my crew worked very hard and efficiently.  His gutter subcontractor was amazing and my new gutters look great.  I have lived in this house for 16 years and my bathrooms always took forever to clear after a shower.  I just accepted this as normal.  With the vents being properly routed I no longer have this problem.  My bathrooms are clearing properly now and I was really surprised in the difference this made.  I'm sure the mold issues will not reappear due to Vincent's expertise.  I highly recommend Roof Rider.  They were easy to work with and I felt I was in excellent hands.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chris Brenan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIwNcTKxMNLhD0Ubr1_JYNAYpIlzRpPrHL3Ahquh_nZgnsGFg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Vincent took the time to review the roof inside and out, identified areas of concern, provided a summary and advised that I didn't actually need the roof replaced at this time. I was so grateful for his honesty and integrity and will definitely be using RoofRider and Vincent's crew when the time comes to proceed with the big job.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"extrasweater","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI0PCi6eoKzVK61FBPkiJO66HqJAmjk8vkFSnBCArQEkjP9Rw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Having my house re-roofed was a job I was dreading - it's a significant investment and the stakes are far too high to make a bad decision.  Owner Vincent's father ran a roofing company for decades so their expertise and commitment is long-standing - rare in an industry which can be notorious for fly-by-night-ers. I am not only pleased but delighted with every aspect of this job - the respectful attitude and performance of the crew, and the transformation of my home's appearance.  I went with rubberized Malarkey shingles - Legacy XL, which are apparently 20% thicker than regular Legacy, but even from the street this quality upgrade is discernible. When the roof is wet, it almost looks like I have wood shingles.  Since I work at home, RR dedicated a larger crew to get the job done faster, but there was no compromise in the quality of workmanship. They also pride themselves on excellent service post-completion.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Parent wass","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIFWllo6F0wW7I9reqIWb4BdlM3DQ8iYyS77_rY-GiH3uzDPA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I'm going just be honest here.  These guys have a superior product and you get what you pay for.  We got estimates from 3 companies to replace our 18 year old roof with some water damage. Roof Riders cost was not the cheapest nor the most expensive. Hard to compare Apple to apples because everyone has a different product,warranty and extras.   The good...Vincent responded quickly, did a thoroughl inspection on the outside and crawled into the attic in inspected for problems there(the others didn't).  He provided suggestions to relocate an exhaust vent(others companies didn't)which I was happy to hear because it leaked and caused water damage to the drywall in our bathroom.  Installed a solar roof vent, 2 roof anchors to tie off when I'm on the roof and modified 2 eves troughs/downspots with custom modifications. This area was the main reason we had the roof inspected and replaced because it had caused water damage.   These items were NO CHARGE on the final bill! The crew was professional, no load blaring music, no constant profanity,just showed up and got it done.  The did clean up daily and keep my wives plants covered and protected.  Finished 95% of the job on time in 4 days. The look, the quality the responsiveness of the quote,  keeping us in the loop on what was going on  all this was A+.   The not so good ...they did squeeze us in while the other couldn't get us in til August, but they were still delayed from the planned start date .  I know weather is a factor and out of their control.   The last 5% of the job, final cleaning of eves trough, eve trough modifications took about 7 extra days but in the end it was done and done right.  The disposal bin  took a few extra days to remove and was a pain but again RR called the company 2x for us the bin guy was just not responsive.  We did end up with a nail in out tire and some debris was left BUT all in a these guys did a good job.  Hey I'm old school and I put Vincent through the paces.  I want the job done perfect and I have high expectations and Vincent and him team got it done.  Every question every request, every call RR handled this job with authentic care and a desire to get it right.  Great local company in sooke.  Would higher them again and highly recommend them.","Images":null,"When":""}]

They respond so quickly and the crew is professional, organized, and keeps everything clean throughout the process. It’s rare to find a team that works this efficiently while being so respectful of your home. Thank you for the quick and effective service!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"jay kent","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUFzdF0QlbAf4AHy2HR0dQnx7BYbmWSSdn7PINE7W6qJjWzulyg4g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I worked on a movie that came to the island and filmed a movie at the end of 2025 and into early 2026. Our main location was a residential house which required cleaning after our shoot was complete. We reached out to this company and requested a quote for a basic clean of the main floor and a small guest suite. Their original quote was $8900.00. This quote was given without an on site assessment. Well that seemed like a bit much so we invited them out to see the house and they did come. After they came we asked for a revised quote but they told me that they weren't comfortable with altering it. I then started looking for other companies and found some that were happy to do the job for less. When we called Servicemaster and told them we would no longer need them and they instantly came back with a new estimate that was $2900.00. (6K below the first number they suggested it would cost to clean a 1500 square foot main floor of a house). So because this company had already done some upholstery cleaning at this home and the owners liked their work we decided to hire them. On the day of the cleaning they showed up and cleaned the house. The crew of six people were in and out within about 4 hours. The next day I asked for an itemized invoice for the work. They sent the same quote for $2900.00. Again we requested an itemized invoice and they then broke down the costs as such - $65 an hour per cleaning tech x6 = $1200.00. Uhmmm okay I guess that makes sense because they were actually working/cleaning for about 3 hours. Also, good on you for paying your crew somewhere hopefully in the neighbourhood of $65 an hour ( cough cough). But the kicker was the extra charge for cleaning the outside deck ($500) and the interior floor ($600). So explain to me how these cleaning charges (deck&floor) aren't covered by the hourly cleaning charge per person that we are paying. In my 20 plus years of film work I have never come across a company that was so dishonest and deceitful. I am definitely accustomed to paying a bit more because we have tight deadlines but this company has disheartened me so much that it came to me writing a google review which says a lot.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Almost 2 years have gone by since then.   Winter is once more approaching.   We are still waiting.  Is M \u0026 M Roofing not qualified to do the flashing around chimneys?   Beware of this company as it has a pattern of not being able to commit to a set start date or completion schedule!   (Because M \u0026 M Roofing is really busy.)   Beware of paying this company in full until the work is fully completed to your satisfaction.  This company is not dependable.  My friend’s experience with M \u0026 M Roofing is that the company does not fully complete the job contracted for despite my friend paying in full immediately. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Tina Loranger","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZF8xAkFkQpGDgQbjXghI8phbsPSnz0zi949DXirufpmf_bbAe=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"***Updated and Edited***

TLDR (too long didn’t read) AKA a summary;
The work was alright, not worth the price. They could have spent more time cleaning the roof and more time cleaning up the yard. Would pick a more responsive company or a smaller company who cares about customer service and timely communication next time.

Review:
The quote for de-mossing my roof was given fairly quickly and the job was also done fairly quickly (approx 4 hours). However, there seems to still be moss here and there on the roof - which apparently is OK. I emailed them Monday night when I got the invoice earlier that day and it’s now Friday night and still no one has responded to my email. I tried to leave a voicemail but it was full. I decided to text them, and still no one replied. Honestly, paying more to have someone pick up your call and answer your questions or come back to take a look would be worth it. When they finally got back to me, they said they were on vacation… then they said they’d come take a look but never set a time. Then they said they didn’t need to come because I had photos and he felt the job was done to satisfaction. However not once did he recognize that I wasn’t satisfied with the result. Again though, for the price I paid compared to the outcome, I expected better results. I’ve seen better roofs from different companies who did better jobs.

Also, no one took photos of the roof before work began or after the work was done -which would have been nice and transparent. Same with letting me know how many anchors were placed and then removed and patched. Nothing.

I’ve paid my bill but a discount wasn’t even offered to alleviate the fact that I was ignored for a week and then again, for that visit that never happened because they never set a concrete date and only have housing them via email and text did I get a response. That’s not customer service.

I’d pick a different company next time.

Oh and offering a discount for a 5-star review is 100% unethical.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCYhfjRuQBjq6LN2IP1KAtZ&fid=0x0:0xcc268975000b1f5e"],"When":"2025-10-11"},{"Name":"Danean Herdman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUMKYZU-WlgUUDYnAIUgdZdp9ILBkh56eTN8YtNcolAO2l8b9ul=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nelson and Dennis did a fantastic job on our windows today!

Booking was easy as Harrison was responsive to chat by phone/email/text with throughout the process.

Will be happy to work with this company again in the future.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"John Chang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIz8dtdJ53VPb-DxdYADXuWA1oeNKoYbdWk2ePMbDVmjCkfBg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The gutter cleaning seemed to go well, even though it's been too long since the last cleaning. So the buildup in some of the gutters may have been large. Thanks to Harrison's crew for doing ta good job.
The window cleaning went well, especially for the unit owners who removed the window screens. Those that didn't would have gotten windows that were cleaned only as well as that situation allowed. Windows with screens removed were cleaned well. Also the crew washed the removed screens. Thanks for that.
All in all I give the Harrison's crew a big "high five".  They did a good job!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Josh Baur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocINs6vJJ3noRp0Tlul0ykdx0I-Q4zH32WJzhq4pMvFOhYvA9kdg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We hired Harrison’s Property Services to take care of a long list of exterior cleaning and maintenance tasks. The Brambleberry team provided the prep work and finishing work - demolition, electrical, plumbing, painting, tiling, backsplash, external wall venting among others.

Key things why Brambleberry stands out:

1) Communication - progress reporting and billing and documented exchanges of what has been agreed on; explain things in plain language to clarify a deliverable.

2) Attention to details where it matters - e.g., providing options for grout colors, matching to our color scheme, precise placement of ligting and fireplace mantle and lots more

3) Planning, Scoping and Execution  - documented project tracking as per project plan; there were timeline slippage but course corrected
4) Reasonable pricing  - not the lowest in the overall scheme of things, the money paid was for the value received

5) Change management - despite scope changes, the team was willing to undergo additional tasks that were challenging with the overall budget not dinged.

Lastly, it is seldom you gain friends and have fun from this kind of projects. We had fun and gained friends. The anxiety at start turned into trust.

These guys can deliver. Thanks very much to Riley and his team, I will recommend to everyone. 10 stars!!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Heather Maciak","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocISTQx36gkqNQvT3tjDRYoIkndZd69XFaPgJiR-wkI-y14ndQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"​I didn't think I would be excited about replacing our roof until we met Riley from Leading Edge Roofing.  We learned of his company from a glowing Neighbours post, and we called him right away.  Our 15 year old roof had been put on over ship-lap, and our first clue that there was a problem was water stains on the bathroom ceiling.  On his first visit, Riley went up into the attic and discovered the problems- the whole interior of the attic was wet, there was mold in a few places, and the vents had been covered up years before by the insulation.  Riley cleared the insulation away from the vents, brought over and installed a dehumidifier to clear out the moisture, and told us how to solve the mold problem.  His estimate came in considerably lower than our first estimate, by the man whose company had installed the original roof and who didn't bother going into the attic to assess the damage.
Riley helped us choose just the right shingles to match the colours of our house, and he also suggested that we add two solar vents for additional venting.  He and his team did an amazing job of stripping the old shingles off and adding plywood to solve any future moisture problems.  When they laid the new shingles, they did a beautiful job, again adding extras such as flashing on the walls above the shingles.  They also cleaned up and cleared away all of the construction materials, leaving the yard spotless.
The finished roof is a masterpiece (another thing I never would have thought to say about a roof!) and we are so happy that we discovered Leading Edge Roofing!  You'll notice that we aren't Riley's only 5-star rating- they are such an impressive company, and we can't praise them highly enough!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Thomas Healey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVjjMj4LhdkBoXBdgE_T448RkRyc1nNsjwGQN5QOLPsjuZWD92-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We called Riley regarding a difficult roofing repair job, he responded right away and was able to make a repair the next day. As a red seal carpenter I recommended Leading edge for all your roofing needs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Scott Metson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJBR8I3ZPoiTcflx3IvlrTlD8Lo4hgMtW9yk4IrhiA2XRKoLA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very pleased with the results...we had a leaky sylight and some other issues on the roof...Riley and his crew were great - friendly and professional...excellent work...I would highly recommend them...","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"susan johnston","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLeZfreua7nO_2znzUhXL7R_ebToqlN-B3GX25Y8F34n3--dA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Riley has such great work ethic and expertise when it comes to roofs and gutters.
I would recommend him to anyone needing any repairs and maintenance in these areas!!
Thank-you Riley!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alex castillo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV3oW-NwGVxzGZfgQ5ICz5bOhGb6XJpLXz5jYPTaxb5DODMk-bdgQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Reference Letter for Leading Edge Roofing:
We hired Riley the owner operator of Leading Edge Roofing to replace an old roof on our house in Saanich BC in the fall of 2024. Riley and his team did a tremendous job on the roof and we are more than pleased with the results. The whole process in dealing with Riley from contacting him for a quote to have the work done and closing out the deal proceeded smoothly and showed his true character. We found him on marketplace for roofing and we placed a request online for a free estimate and was contacted within a few days. And we know marketplace can be horrible at best of times. But within a few days of placing the quote request, we’d already had a number and a meetings to discussing the project details. Riley drove there to take a look at the roof before providing the quote. We did get three quotes as well and he stood out of the other two. He listened to all my concerns and wishes such as removing the old chimney, my concerns of whether I had enough vents and how bad could the project be once he starts ripping into it. Through all this he was more than happy to answer all questions/concerns we had and gave us honest  answers and really took the time on the what possible things might be hidden that is unknown until the project starts. He was very courteous and notified us of the start delay as soon as he knew it was going to happen, which wasn’t needed because he was already starting pretty quick from when I reached out but it was still much appreciated! Once the work got started though, it was complete quick! As we weren’t home to see the progress each day, he kindly sent us photos of the progress by text. When the roof needed more attention which costed more because we needed all new plywood it was not a shock as he walked us through the what if’s AT the beginning of the project and he still showed us why and that was amazing as we knew no corners were being skipped.  At completion, the roof was truly a solid new roof with the old chimney gone and he corrected and added the right amount of vents and solved an issue that we had not known which was the main bathroom vent was NOT venting out. His attention to details shows how he cares about his craftsmanship. In addition, the property was left in immaculate shape – you’d never know there had been a work crew there. They took care of removing the waste from the old roof and everything was left exactly as it was before the crew came in, with the exception of the new roof on the house! The cost of the project was exactly as quoted in the beginning and there were no unpleasant surprises. This is a fantastic company to work with. Riley is hardworking, courteous, fast, honest, and stands by his work. His crew is also an example of him as they were all talented and equally polite sharing the common goal of hard work. l highly recommend Riley for your roof installed anywhere in Victoria B.C! I now have a roofing friend in my rolodex. Thanks Riley","Images":null,"When":""}]

We recently had our old aluminum sunroom replaced by Northern Tropic Homes with a stunning western red cedar-framed studio eave sunroom, and we couldn’t be happier with the results. After doing extensive research, we chose Northern Tropics because of their excellent warranty, exceptional quality, and outstanding craftsmanship—their pricing, while slightly higher than some local competitors, clearly reflects the value of the product and peace of mind they provide.

This is now a true four-season room, and the transformation is incredible. The western red cedar adds warmth and elegance, and the premium glass they use makes a noticeable difference in comfort and aesthetics.

The entire team was fantastic. Ryan, the lead carpenter, is exceptionally skilled and clearly takes great pride in his work. Sayer, the apprentice, impressed us with his strong work ethic and outstanding customer service—he has a bright future ahead. Daunte stepped in to assist throughout the project and was equally professional and capable. And Troy, the owner, was a pleasure to work with—he kept everything on time and on budget, and his communication was excellent throughout.

This is a family-run business, and it shows in the care and respect every team member brought to our home. Every Northern Tropics employee who came to our property was kind, respectful, and professional.

We wholeheartedly recommend Northern Tropics Homes to anyone looking for high-quality craftsmanship and a team that truly cares about their work. We’ll be recommending them to our family and friends without hesitation.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jenn T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWj2CYrdYq3T6BWwARRJpN2FkFNUJWGR7cQaI5UQzqrN87zoqUM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were thoroughly impressed with Northern Tropic Homes from the very beginning. The entire team’s friendliness and professionalism throughout the project made the experience even better, and their meticulous attention to detail was truly remarkable. A special thanks to the amazing crew—Steven, Braydon, Will, and Sayer—who brought our dream deck to life. We are beyond thrilled with the outcome and will definitely be working with Northern Tropic Homes again in the future!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Brett Callaway","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXfkLZRSTTxVK5bYxVNACSJL2fhXwbTOZ_YcDXC-x_w89ls757s=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing addition to our house we love it.  Thank you for the great work and making us feel like we are outside while being inside our family room.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD-kujfKBhyP-eQTc9OGJu3&fid=0x0:0xa3dd80bc04c6543a"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"Matthew Lyall","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUDRNBWAvLx-bv6D_zk9Q4VW2QWiAgsUp-B1TS5nfURZ2F4rl1A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
We couldn’t be happier with the sunroom Northern Tropic Homes built for us. From start to finish, the entire experience was fantastic. The finished space includes two large sets of bifold doors that completely open up to the outdoors — it’s created the perfect indoor-outdoor flow and has become our favorite spot in the house. It honestly feels like we’ve added an entirely new living space that connects us beautifully to our yard.

Troy was amazing to work with — incredibly responsive, helpful, and flexible throughout the whole process. Our project was tied to a larger, ever-shifting construction timeline, and Troy was patient and accommodating at every step. He helped guide us from the early design phase all the way through to completion, always making sure we felt supported and informed.

Ryan and Sayer were the builders on our project, and they were both fantastic — hardworking, professional, and super friendly. It’s clear they take a lot of pride in their craft. The attention to detail and quality of workmanship shows in every part of the build.

If you’re looking for a reliable, talented team to bring your vision to life — especially for outdoor living or sunroom spaces — we would absolutely recommend Northern Tropic Homes. Thank you again to Troy, Ryan, and Sayer for helping create something so special for our home!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"DDAP","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKX97_o3W8gXUK_5IFB7EMOI_EtJhG_Zo7jiO_KRHvnAidaeA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Troy and his excellent team of Ryan, John and Sayer have done an amazing job when they removed and replaced my solarium! Everyone was so respectful and polite. John and Ryan are very skilled and meticulous carpenters. I was impressed. Marielle D.","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Top Pair Roofing Inc
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"M Venturi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJbDLOEPhCEfKPC4y65MLsZIs7JlcE3pX6aRNbHBLZAsnNN_A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ours was a very challenging re-roofing job on a home that was originally built in 1893 (excellent balloon construction), renovated starting 1993 and subsequently expanded to triple its size. Greg, Ryan and their excellent team were amazing, dealing openly, honestly, and professionally with each uncovering of previous shoddy work. Prior "professional" roofers had vented bathrooms into either soffit space or dead zones and had not installed venting into the roofs themselves. Ryan and his team had to replace horrendously damaged sheathing, showing us every one of them, and arranged for ventilation specialists to inspect and treat all roof spaces as required. All options for unforeseen additional work and costs involved were explained thoroughly to receive our approval. All roofs are now properly vented and they provided additional roof vents for all bathrooms and hooked them up for us. We were treated as if we were family. The entire team was amazing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICi2t_MjQE&fid=0x0:0x1fcade7d5c8fe299"],"When":"2020-10-30"},{"Name":"tara cadeau","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUE2YJ8YFPqZd73jWstB7O6ImlPhy_pWKduBU3PAYA0FyQOyHF-kA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Greg and his partner have been so incredibly helpful and reliable for us. I would absolutely recommend them and use them again without hesitation.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Katherine Whitehorn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLC1bdvw6wHIMMC7fxH5F-Mi79OJzQ85S0nTRy-ZkYp5T9QtA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I just wanted to make a review about this roofing company that did repairs on my roof. After having such a good experience with them referred them to one of my friends that needed a whole new roof on their home. Once again Top Pair roofing was a great experience for my friend. They came quickly re-place the whole new roof! We both love the fact they keep in their budget and we’re finished on time. I will be recommending them to all family members and friends for their roofing concerns!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sawyer Redpath","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKOIqBkHUm7Fv8u-uyn-lzJcaoJkJUGYezm_AYHH_T9FIizNg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Greg did a smaller but urgent job patching some shingles for me. I was happy with the work, he also provided photos and a description of his assessment of the roofs health and outlook which was quite accurate.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_8UZaSlcvj3SgOi4wq7KAfPGjMcrVBs3NTjAmiwkTpl_uKN0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am happy to add one more FIVE stars' review to this company.

I chose this company based on the google reviews. I called the company and Greg replied me and came over.   He gave me a free inspection and quotation, and he fixed  my roof within a week to meet my satisfaction.  My is a small job which many companies don't care about it. I'll use this company in the future , and highly recommend this company to my friends and anyone who has roof work needs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Karalyn Schweter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJvZEd6sFq2pJi1JZDzxeU7nE2LDsayMUoJEQEA7-wVD8ukngua=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I would highly recommend Top Pair.
Ryan was very thorough with any & all questions we had, the quote was itemized and work started earlier than expected.
The crew of three were extremely professional and the foreman let us know each day what was going to happen, the day it rained they drove in from Victoria to Cobble Hill to tell us in person they would not be working. The crew was always here on time (early) and worked hard in the blistering heat, they cleaned up every time they went for a break and at night before leaving.
Our roof looks amazing, so much so that even while our roof was being done people in the neighborhood were coming to get business cards.We had two skylights put in; 1 was a fixed skylight and the other was an opening skylight. We loved the opening skylight so much that we asked if we could change the fixed skylight to an opening one, this was after the roof was finished and it was not a problem. We were so happy with the service we received.  I would highly recommend Top Pair Roofing if you need a roof done.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Trish McMaster","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWncE00YEhbfaEVNyvJkNCFn-6sd_cvMIYEOPWt_TXUeMR7qxM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had some roof damage from the wind storm, and were referred to Top Pair Roofing. Ryan was awesome! Came out and did the repair, and made some recommendations for improvements in the spring. Thank you so very much for the quick service, we greatly appreciate it!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Arden Koontz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW-I2RmutK2TRsRm5I6EKL6164SAjvGKbDxPPaTCVZt91Ho6Mfi=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a smallish but tricky roofing job and over two years tried working with at least five roofing contractors.  Ryan was willing to take it on and was the first company to follow through and persist in a challenging situation (figuring out how to get materials for a roof ridge when original supplier was out of business). Ryan came up with a creative solution that was an excellent, affordable alternative to the approach that I and the other roofers thought was the only way to do it.","Images":null,"When":""}]

They sent a gentleman named Gil, and when I say gentleman I mean it with full respect. He was able to show us our roofs short comings and did not try to sugar coat it. A real professional. I would recommend this company every day of the week.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"rosie angus","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKg2-DGe83ExQAiYTuOSDeagAqYNIjko6M_b6pUrzIU1Mw2mg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I am quite disappointed with my recent experience with Alpha Roofing and Cladding. After reaching out to them about a possible leak on a roof they installed back in 2009, I had to wait over three weeks for a site visit. The roof was still under manufacturers warranty, and I made alpha aware of this when I initially contacted them. I contacted them several times to try to find out when they would come out to assess the area and there was no mention of a service fee for the site visit during this communication.

When the technician finally arrived, his evaluation was minimal at best. He merely stood on a ladder, shined a flashlight from the attic entrance, and did not conduct a proper inspection of the damp trusses that we were concerned about. On the roof, he suggested applying a couple of dabs of clear caulking to the exposed nail heads, which were part of their original installation.

To my surprise, I received an invoice for $335 after this brief visit. There was no upfront mention of a fee for the site visit. When I reached out for clarity regarding the charge, I encountered rude and dismissive communication from the administrative staff. After much back and forth, the fee was eventually reduced by $100.

I am more than happy to pay for work completed and I understand that warranty issues can create a grey area, but this has all been quite disappointing.

Considering that our roof is under a 30-year warranty and was installed by Alpha, I expected better service, especially in terms of customer support. Overall, my experience has been one of frustration and dissatisfaction. I would not recommend Alpha Roofing and Cladding based on this experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"C Shapco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocISt3Svh6XnfIVsvMo93_R5WG6YNj5DU2mXf6HuABS4QtGw2Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"An employee was taking up half of the roadway with no hazards, pylons, or way of directing traffic. I highly recommend this company.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Yilan Shen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLmHa666Tt6oCQlj3DfTq-9ToHd4JhkngWnJ_ohD0KjnqWhcw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had an excellent experience with this company and can’t recommend them highly enough.

They initially completed our gutter installation, and the quality of the work was outstanding. During that project, they also helped us assessed and address several small issues around the house at no additional cost, which truly demonstrated their professionalism and integrity.

Later on, we experienced a leak inside our home with heavy rain (unrelated to the gutters). We suspected it might be related to the roofing or a vent and reached out to them because of the trust we had in their workmanship. Even though they were very busy, they went out of their way to come take a look and resolved the issue in about 15 minutes. Their efficiency, expertise, and willingness to help were truly impressive.

It’s rare to find a company that not only delivers excellent gutter and roofing work, but also genuinely cares about their customers and stands behind their service. We would absolutely hire them again and confidently recommend them to anyone in need of gutter or roofing work.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"P J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJTLOSrRHKI1cvcmKd544TNruZ7gwpubmHffSeVsiH0lEUl_54B=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Allpro was prompt to reply to messages and provided a competitive quote. Thomas brought samples of all colours and gutter profiles available and scheduled the work to occur not long after.  We're especially happy that they worked around newly planted grass without disturbing it and they did an extra tidy job on our bunkie, behind the main house.

Thank you, Thomas and team!  Your personal attention to customer satisfaction is impressive.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEOPNutfMxuaR6gE&fid=0x0:0xaba72f6a4f7b8143"],"When":"2025-5-25"},{"Name":"Ian Snider","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWOhwOLGBLvgYTuGVEp56wU7Ph5Lr_L9qUzJ-Dm6L4apjTFKknm=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Outstanding Service and Craftsmanship!

We recently hired Allpro Gutter Installation to replace the gutters, downspouts, and fascia boards on our 1919 character home, and we couldn’t be happier with the results. From start to finish, the experience was smooth, professional, and exceeded our expectations.

Thomas was a pleasure to work with—knowledgeable, communicative, and incredibly professional. He provided us with a very competitive quote and took the time to explain the scope of work in detail. We really appreciated his transparency and attention to the unique needs of our older home.

During the installation, Mike and Sheldon did an excellent job. Not only did they install everything with great care and precision, but they also went the extra mile by sistering up several rafters to ensure the new fascia boards were securely attached—especially important given some areas had rot. That level of craftsmanship and pride in their work truly stood out.

The final result looks fantastic, and it blends beautifully with the character of our home. We highly recommend Allpro Gutter Installation to anyone looking for quality work, fair pricing, and a team that genuinely cares about getting it right.

P.S. Sorry about the wasps, guys—next time we’ll throw in a beekeeper suit with your tool belts! 🐝😅","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dan Parker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK2sM5N35qBRCpcZVtoIbb54gMLbcVQIb9T6FDjtBLLXpF7Dw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Phoned and was told they had finished a job 15 minutes previous. Can’t say enough good things about this company. Any gutter work from now on goes to these guys.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chris Jenkinson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLIMhXn_kQjk5bTYS5IfoKUFKusS95SNd7N_Uw_HmaYCG3ixg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"All Pro Guttering cut a custom piece of guttering for my pergola and did an excellent job. If you talk to him nicely, he might be able to bring you supplies as long as they fit in the rolling tool crib.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICltffBCw&fid=0x0:0x83095f1911725a99"],"When":"2023-11-23"},{"Name":"Graeme H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLz68hla75Dd85gJV_uKtzRbb-EAXyB-YkJvA57BrwP3AyC0g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Whatever you do, don’t show up expecting anything within a half hour of close. Then, upon driving into the yard to go to the door warehouse, I was AGAIN reminded by the attendant that they were almost closed (it was 20 minutes to close). I was so fried at that point that I just about asked for a refund.

I get that this place caters to contractors but at least try to run a friendly business. Every time I go in there the staff are rude, like they expect me to know everything already. It’s gross. Everyone in the company that we’ve had contact with has been knowledgable and friendly and I have no hesitation recommending Besolar to anyone wanting to generate their own electricity.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDoxCDXVcqBojuBmoDs9EBA&fid=0x0:0x88218221e1ddae4c"],"When":"2025-10-8"},{"Name":"Bruce Brown","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVpGLB2wggyEhyQmZRdKhCssrXBgFmyzdOQnHRdFgoSEUj_vyaT=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently had 7 new solar panels installed on our roof by BeSolar, which were added to an existing system. We were very pleased to have the work done by Owen, Luke and Kai as well as Adam, the electrician.  The crew was knowledgeable, hard working, polite and answered all of our questions thoughtfully.
We are more than happy to recommend BeSolar to others seeking solar installations!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA0bOM_GZifdzFwvRlKjEQl&fid=0x0:0x88218221e1ddae4c"],"When":"2025-11-25"},{"Name":"jim warder","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIPJY7uFpOh3lZXeujfXx95Ku308SSifw8uJkQQq7_GRV_5CQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've been interested in renewable energy all of my adult life and this year we decided it was time to take the next step and install PV panels on our home in Victoria.
