A strong point in BeSolar's favor for me was their affiliation with Brewis Electric, a company with a long history in the region, so I felt they would be able to honor any warranties. Almost as important was their very competitive quote. But it was the initial experience (before the contract was signed) working with the company that made the decision easy. First step, Rod came out to our home to check the roof  was in good shape and get a sense of how everything was situated in relationship to our home. Trees, dormers, neighboring houses, etc. Over the next few weeks he sent several different configurations with associated costs and performance expectations. During this process we spoke on the phone at least a dozen times to go over and adjust the different configurations and panel count that would work best within our budget. His patience throughout this process was commendable. Never once did I feel pressured or obligated to make a decision. Once we were settled on the layout and costs, we signed a contract and paid the deposit on an 8.5 kWatt system (17 panels). Next, Geoff contacted me to schedule an installation date. When the crew showed up, the guys (Nigel, Owen, and Luke) all introduced themselves and then got to work. Geoff also touched base several times over the next few days to check on progress and answer questions. One thing I had been concerned about was damage to my very steep roof (12/12 slope), but the guys all wore soft soled shoes (skate shoes?) and used rigid foam blocks to walk and kneel on while working. This minimized wear on the roof as well as their legs and ankles on such a steep pitch. Safety first! They used the same foam blocks to support the ladder used to hoist the panels up onto the roof. Overall I could see no sign of wear or damage after the install was complete. Throughout the installation it became evident that they both enjoyed the work they were doing and enjoyed working together, even during a wet few days! We chatted a bit about renewable energy and EVs and they mentioned how they enjoyed working for BeSolar, and that both installers and office personnel all worked well together and enjoyed the work. To me, the workplace environment and the job satisfaction of it's employees is hugely important to the quality of work that comes out the door, and that positive environment was on display. On the second last day of the install, Adam the electrician showed up in the morning to install a 240V outlet by my driveway for EV charging and to tie the PV wiring into the electrical panel. Again, Adam was great to work with. Always cheerful and ready to answer any questions I might have. With the days being so short (1st week December) the guys finished up in the dark and we said our good byes. At the end of the next working day, Nigel showed up unexpectedly to check if they'd missed anything in the dark the day before. I am very impressed with their professionalism and the commitment they have to doing a good job. Even little aesthetic touches like routing a cable where it will have the least impact visually. Today Adam called to ask to drop by to attach the last sticker to the main panel for permit approval. Next I was contacted to say an account was setup so I could monitor the power generated by the system. It's just been a very smooth and well coordinated process from start to finish. It's also obvious the company is respected and trusted by BCHydro. I applied for my self generation permit the day after the project was complete and it was approved and the system gained access to the grid immediately. Working with all the folks at BeSolar has been a very enjoyable process, and I don't hesitate to recommend BeSolar or their parent company, Bewis Electric. Thanks BeSolar for such a great experience! 5 Stars!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBz-kxv2Xxvzc_Nn3Y5Wh72&fid=0x0:0x88218221e1ddae4c"],"When":"2025-12-9"},{"Name":"Cindy Meiklejohn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWoQVNUg_TXO0baGJC9uMDPOESuTOmF1y0LIrOvGfb0BywNDgHU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Soooo excited to finally have solar panels on our house! The installers were friendly, professional, and tidy. I would 100% recommend besolar.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kyril Cullen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUuASTVtDmt-PA1LlRowSVLMawuKPvqOcqDeDzM_UtScuo7nkHn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Without hesitation beSolar is the highly recommended solar panel team in Victoria.

After proper evaluation, it is clear to see their is no cost savings via the larger 'discount' the competition is offering but there are a number of factors which are dimishing the quality of service, installation and equipment you will receive compared to beSolar.

beSolar is a subsidiary of a well and long established local electrical company (Brewis Electric).

Their knowledged team of tradespersons have the proper background, training and specialization ensuring their products are highly efficient, suitable for Victoria's weather, and warrantied/guaranteed in a manner which is not found in other competitors (based on my research).

As they are local, installation and after install support is readily available unlike other providers who rely on out of area contractors  which impedes not only quality of service but efficiency in responding with delays of weeks if you have a problem.

Reid and his team were extremely thorough in providing all required awareness, projected costs and savings as well as readily answering all of our technical questions with relevant information supported by industry/relevant experience and facts.

Their no pressure quote visit to our residence was maintained throughout our evaluation of providers which also led to our decision.

beSolar installation team was a professional and competent crew of friendly, respectful technicians who took pride in their work, respect of our property and my family while on site.  Wonderful experience and highly efficient work despite the brutal heat we were experiencing.

I  strongly recommend beSolar for your solar needs as they have proven, beyond doubt, they are a leader in high quality solar equipment, relationship building with their clients, respectful and professional sales and installtion environments which is becoming a long forgotten realm of historical customer service.

Don't hesitate to contact Reid and his team at beSolar.
